summary: Software engineer with experience building Python tools, API integrations, and CI workflows for small engineering teams.

jobs.summary: Built internal developer tools and automation for data teams.
responsibilities: Built Python command line tools that automated recurring data-quality checks for analysts.
Maintained GitHub Actions workflows for tests, linting, and internal package publishing.
Added structured logging and dashboards for scheduled ingestion jobs.
Wrote onboarding documentation for repeatable release and incident workflows.
achievements: Reduced manual release checklist work by replacing repeated steps with CLI commands.
Improved failure visibility for scheduled jobs by adding structured logs and dashboards.

jobs.summary: Supported internal operations tools and API integrations.
responsibilities: Integrated third-party APIs into internal operations tools.
Created small automation scripts that reduced manual spreadsheet updates.
Documented support playbooks for common customer data issues.
achievements: Helped support staff resolve common data issues with documented scripts and playbooks.

projects.name: Release Helper
projects.description: A small CLI that generated changelog drafts and checked package metadata before release.
highlights: Checked release metadata before internal package publication.
Generated changelog drafts from structured commit notes.
